description:
REQ-032 Phase 2: Cross-phase memory (Phase 1) is already implemented via persist_phase_output/load_prior_phase_outputs in phase_executor.rs. The next step is task-level persistent memory.

Add load_task_memory() that reads .ao/state/tasks/<task_id>/memory.md if it exists. Add __TASK_MEMORY__ placeholder to workflow_phase.prompt. In build_phase_prompt(), load and substitute. Agents can append to this file during execution.

Key files: crates/orchestrator-cli/src/services/runtime/workflow_executor/phase_executor.rs, crates/orchestrator-cli/prompts/runtime/workflow_phase.prompt
title: Implement task-level memory file (TASK-XXX.memory.md)
